items.bullet: Ypsilanti Township secured a 12-month YCUA moratorium on water/sewer for data centers after U-M bought approximately 144 Textile Road acres for a computing facility.
Augusta draft bars large data centers outside GI, demands 10-acre minimums, 400-ft residential buffers, and closed-loop cooling for any HRDF over 10 MW.
Wixom council weighs ordinance and moratorium lift for a >500,000 sq ft data center project at 30625 Wixom Road tonight at 7 p.m.
Ypsilanti Twp pushes 12-month water/sewer moratorium as UMich eyes 144 acres for high-performance computing facility exempt from local taxes.
